REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR ON JUN-18-2015 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. PLAINTIFFS DON VOSS AND IRENE VOSS PASSED AWAY. BRAYTON WAS RELIEVED AS COUNSEL OF RECORD AND ORDER WAS SERVED ON 3/9/15 TO THE DAUGHTER, ELOISE SHAHA AND TO THE LAW FIRM OF MATTHEWS, KLUCK, WALSH & WYKLE. BRAYTON WAS ADVISED THAT MS. SHAHA WAS NAMED PERSONAL REPRESENTATIVE OF THE ESTATE OF IRENE VOSS AND IS REPRESENTED IN THE ESTATE MATTER BY ATTORNEY LARRY KLUCK. ACCORDING TO BRAYTON, MS. SHAHA AND MR. KLUCK HAVE REFUSED TO RESPOND TO BRAYTON TO PROVIDE DIRECTION AS TO HOW TO PROCEED WITH THIS ACTIVE LAWSUIT. ON 4/16/15 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE, THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE AND THE COURT MAILED OUT A NOTICE TO TO THE DAUGHTER, ELOISE SHAHA AND TO THE LAW FIRM OF MATTHEWS, KLUCK, WALSH & WYKLE AS TO WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE. THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER DISMISSED FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: RVELUZ; COURT REPORTER: KIM RICHARDSON, CSR#5915 FROM AIKEN WELCH (877)451-1580 FOR DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL BERRY & BERRY. (206)
